message:
feat(lab): divergence classification pipeline, fuzz→dual-run promotion, and divergence corpus registry

dual_run.rs (+725 lines):
- ProvisionalDivergenceClass: 7-variant pre-rerun classification
  (Pass, UnsupportedSurface, ArtifactSchemaViolation,
  InsufficientObservability, SchedulerNoiseSuspected,
  SemanticMismatchAdmittedSurface, HardContractBreak)
- classify_provisional() deriving class from ComparisonVerdict
- RerunPolicy and RerunDecision for automatic rerun determination
- DualRunHarness orchestrating lab+live comparison with configurable
  rerun budget, divergence classification, and artifact retention
- PromotedFuzzScenario bridging fuzz findings into dual-run scenarios
- promote_fuzz_finding(), promote_regression_case(),
  promote_regression_corpus() for systematic fuzz→differential promotion
- ReplayMetadata gains nondeterminism_notes field
- SeedLineageRecord now derives PartialEq+Eq

fuzz.rs (+115 lines):
- FuzzFinding::to_promoted_scenario() convenience method
- FuzzRegressionCase::to_promoted_scenario()
- FuzzRegressionCorpus::to_promoted_scenarios()
- FuzzReport::to_promoted_findings() promoting all raw findings

replay.rs (+618 lines):
- DivergenceBundleLevel (Full/Reduced) retention control
- DifferentialPolicyClass: 7-variant post-rerun classification
- DivergenceCorpusEntry with seed lineage, minimization lineage,
  artifact bundle, and regression promotion state tracking
- DivergenceCorpusRegistry with schema versioning, add/promote/query
- RegressionPromotionState lifecycle: investigating→minimized→
  promoted_regression/known_open
- MinimizationRecord preserving shrinker lineage chain

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
